name: searchDocuments
description: Searches for documents by name, content, or both. Use listDocuments for browsing and this tool for targeted queries.

query.description: Search term to find in document names or content.

searchIn.description: Where to search: document names, content, or both.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return.

modifiedAfter.description: Only return documents modified after this date (ISO 8601 format, e.g., "2024-01-01").
